tagline: June 10, 2026 Lakehouse Replay is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: June 10, 2026 Lakehouse Replay is now available in Beta. Lakehouse Replay automatically replays a sampled set of read only serverless workloads from your workspace against upcoming Databricks Runtime releases to detect and fix regressions before they reach production.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 10, 2026 Lakehouse
capabilities.desc: June 10, 2026 Lakehouse Replay is now available in Beta.
